title: JmapChatClient: Arc<dyn AuthProvider> + Clone
description:
What: Make JmapChatClient implement Clone by changing auth field from Box<dyn AuthProvider> to Arc<dyn AuthProvider>.

Algorithm:
1. In crates/jmap-chat/src/client.rs:
   a. Add 'use std::sync::Arc;' import.
   b. Change struct field: auth: Box<dyn AuthProvider> → auth: Arc<dyn AuthProvider>
   c. Add #[derive(Clone)] to JmapChatClient.
   d. In JmapChatClient::new(), change 'auth: Box::new(auth)' → 'auth: Arc::new(auth)'
2. In crates/jmap-chat/src/auth.rs:
   a. Add 'use std::sync::Arc;' import.
   b. Add blanket impl: impl AuthProvider for Arc<dyn AuthProvider> { fn build_client(&self) -> Result<reqwest::Client, ClientError> { (**self).build_client() } fn auth_header(&self) -> Option<(HeaderName, HeaderValue)> { (**self).auth_header() } }
   c. Keep the existing Box<dyn AuthProvider> impl intact.
3. Run: cargo test -p jmap-chat to confirm no regressions.

Defensive rules:
- Do NOT change any method signatures or call sites.
- Do NOT touch client_task.rs (Arc<JmapChatClient> wrapping stays as-is for now).
- The AuthProvider trait itself must not change.
- Existing NoneAuth, BearerAuth, BasicAuth, CustomCaAuth impls must not change.

Tests: All existing tests pass. JmapChatClient::clone() compiles (add a compile-only test).
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p jmap-chat passes. cargo clippy -p jmap-chat -- -D warnings passes. JmapChatClient: Clone verified by compiler.
